name: Learning Management System
summary: An internal enterprise LMS built for PT. Komatsu Remanufacturing Asia that centralizes employee training workflows — from planning, approvals, scheduling, to certification tracking and reporting dashboards.
highlights: Role-based access control with multi-level approval workflows
Interactive scheduling system with calendar integration
Automated certification tracking and expiry notifications
Real-time reporting dashboards with exportable data

images.label: Dashboard Overview
images.description: Training metrics, active courses, recommendations, and recent activity.

images.alt: Learning Management System course management workflow
images.label: Training Workflow
images.description: Course planning, scheduling, and employee learning progress in one flow.

images.label: Reporting View
images.description: Certification tracking and report-ready data for internal stakeholders.

name: Flight Booking & E-Ticketing Platform
summary: A team-based online flight booking and e-ticketing platform developed during Binar Academy's Kampus Merdeka program. Led frontend delivery for responsive booking experiences while collaborating with the backend team on API integration, authentication, payments, notifications, and digital ticket generation.
highlights: Led frontend task planning and delivery using ClickUp for team coordination
Built flight search, seat selection, multi-passenger booking, payment history, and ticket printing flows
Integrated frontend features with APIs for authentication, flight data, bookings, payments, and notifications
Managed application state with Redux Toolkit for structured and maintainable user flows

images.label: Flight Search
images.description: A responsive flight search flow for selecting routes, schedules, and passenger requirements.

images.label: Select Flight
images.description: A flight selection interface that lets users compare available routes, departure schedules, fares, and airline options before continuing with the booking process.

images.label: Payment
images.description: A payment page that summarizes booking details, selected payment method, and the next steps required to complete the reservation.

name: Kalimantan Biodiversity Portal
summary: A web-based biodiversity portal that helps users explore species and forest data across Kalimantan through responsive information pages, filters, and interactive maps.
highlights: Delivered the complete user-facing portal from documented SRS requirements
Built interactive maps for species distribution and forest area visualization
Implemented species and conservation filters with regional drill-downs
Collaborated with the backend team to integrate biodiversity and spatial data

images.label: Portal Overview
images.description: A responsive portal for exploring biodiversity information, species records, and forest-related data across Kalimantan.

images.label: Species Detail Information
images.description: A detailed species information view presenting key data such as scientific name, conservation status, habitat, distribution, and related biodiversity records.

images.label: Species Distribution Visualization
images.description: An interactive map with species filters, conservation status filtering, hover details, and regional drill-downs.

name: Personal Portfolio
summary: A performance-conscious personal portfolio built with Next.js, GSAP, Swiper, Lenis, and data-driven sections to present experience, projects, resume access, and contact information through smooth responsive interactions.
highlights: Built scroll-based section transitions and reveals with GSAP ScrollTrigger
Implemented responsive Swiper carousels for experience and project media
Optimized mobile behavior by reducing heavy scroll effects and layout shifts
Audited performance with Lighthouse across desktop and mobile production builds

images.alt: Personal portfolio hero section with animated introduction
images.label: Hero Experience
images.description: Animated hero layout with social links, resume CTA, profile visual, and responsive typography.

images.label: Experience Carousel
images.description: Responsive experience cards using GSAP on desktop and Swiper interaction on mobile/tablet.

images.label: Project Showcase
images.description: Data-driven project cards with multi-image Swiper media, slide controls, and performance-aware loading.
